text.title: Supabase RLS Audit Checklist Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply Supabase RLS Audit Checklist end-to-end. Each step names its input, action, output, and (where relevant) a decision-gate.

step.name: check-policies
step.action: Query pg_policies; map verbs per table.

step.name: fixture-test
step.action: Insert tenant_a row + tenant_b row; auth as tenant_a; SELECT — must see only own row.
step.decision-gate: If fixture missing OR test fails, refuse to close the audit.
